# Omeagle

> Omeagle is a free, anonymous random video chat and text chat platform that connects strangers worldwide. No sign up required.

## What is Omeagle?

Omeagle is a modern Omegle alternative offering random video chat and text chat with strangers online. The platform provides AI-powered moderation, anonymous connections, and instant matching — all completely free with no account required.

## Core Features

- **Random Video Chat**: Instant video connections with strangers worldwide
- **Text Chat**: Anonymous text-based conversations
- **AI Moderation**: Real-time content filtering for safety
- **Anonymous**: No sign up, no profiles, no personal data required
- **Country Matching**: Filter by preferred countries
- **Interest Tags**: Match based on shared interests
- **Mobile-First**: Works on any device, no app download needed
- **Report & Block**: Full safety controls during conversations

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://omeagle.online/
- About: https://omeagle.online/about
- Blog: https://omeagle.online/blog
- Safety: https://omeagle.online/safety
- Privacy Policy: https://omeagle.online/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://omeagle.online/terms
- Contact: https://omeagle.online/contact

## Technology

- Frontend: React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS
- Backend: Supabase (auth, database, real-time)
- Video: WebRTC with TURN/STUN servers
- Deployment: Vercel

## How It Works

1. Visit omeagle.online
2. Click "Start" on Video Chat or Text Chat
3. Grant camera/microphone permission (video only)
4. Get instantly matched with a random stranger
5. Chat via video or text
6. Click "Next" for a new match or "Stop" to end

## Safety

Omeagle uses AI-powered moderation, keyword filtering, and a report/block system. All conversations are encrypted via WebRTC and never recorded or stored.

## Contact

- Website: https://omeagle.online
